case_title: BALINT VOJNITS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOJNITS, BALINT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BALINT VOJNITS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE ECHAVIA, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOJNITS, BALINT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED MAR-03-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/19/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD-RETURN TO SENDER."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $560.00 FILED BY VOJNITS, BALINT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.
